title: Power Outage Prediction Project
description: A project aimed at taking in historical American power outage data and analyzing it to predict how long a new power outage will last.

title: San Diego Trolley Ridership vs. Crime rates
description: Using San Diego trolley ridership data over the past few years, me and a team tried to uncover trends between trolley ridership at a station and crime in the area.

title: Data manipulation website
description: This website is an exercise in how data visualizations can be manipulated to tell differing sides of the same proposition. Clever visual tricks and sneaky ommissions of data can help tip the scales one way or another.
